pkgmetadata.longdescription: This program serves as a demonstration of the functions of the SG library (to be found on Hackage: <http://hackage.haskell.org/cgi-bin/hackage-scripts/package/SG>)) by visualising it with OpenGL. It also serves as a sort of informal test suite for the SG library. Documentation is available at the top of the main module's source code.
